projectScope.categoryUnit: Each directory under src/data/roadmaps is treated as a top-level ebook category.
projectScope.nextCategoryPolicy: Finish the current category before starting another roadmap unless the automation prompt explicitly reprioritizes the category order.
projectScope.backlogDescription: All other roadmap directories under src/data/roadmaps remain future ebook categories.
